entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop evaluated for yield potential in a cool-wet region

entities.description: A cereal crop evaluated for yield potential in a cool-wet region

entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: A legume crop evaluated for yield potential in a cool-wet region

entities.name: YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The maximum possible yield of a crop under specific conditions

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the harvested grain per unit area

entities.name: DRY MATTER YIELD
entities.description: The total biomass of the crop excluding water content

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development and increase in size of the crop

entities.name: PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall success of the crop in terms of growth and yield

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: Management practices used to reduce soil erosion and optimize water availability

entities.name: CROP DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The practice of growing a variety of crops to reduce risk and improve soil health

entities.name: WATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of controlling the application and conservation of water for crops

entities.name: PLANT DENSITY
entities.description: The number of plants grown per unit area of land

entities.name: FERTILITY LEVELS
entities.description: The amount of nutrients applied to the soil to support crop growth

entities.name: COMPLETELY RANDOMIZED BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental design used to minimize the effect of environmental gradients

entities.name: TIED RIDGE TILLAGE
entities.description: A water conservation tillage practice involving the creation of ridges to trap water

entities.name: DISC PLOUGH
entities.description: A standard tillage method used as a control in the study

entities.name: FLAT TILLAGE
entities.description: A tillage system where the soil is left level

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in global or regional weather patterns affecting agriculture

entities.name: VERY COOL-WET REGION
entities.description: The specific climatic condition of the study area in Nayandarua County

entities.name: NITROGEN FERTILIZER
entities.description: A chemical nutrient applied to the soil to increase crop productivity

entities.name: SEASONS
entities.description: The periodic changes in weather patterns throughout the year

entities.name: AGRICULTURE VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The degree to which agricultural systems are susceptible to climate change impacts

entities.name: NAYANDARUA COUNTY
entities.description: The administrative region in Kenya where the study was conducted

entities.name: NYAHURURU
entities.description: The specific town or area in Central Kenya where the experiments took place

entities.name: CENTRAL KENYA
entities.description: The broader geographic region encompassing the study site
